text: The geometry and emptiness of the hallway in the first image makes me feel detached and slightly disoriented, as if I am suspended in a liminal moment. Entering the second scene, surrounded by colors, text, and screens, I feel curiosity awakening within me, drawn by the invitation to contemplate the nature of innovation and the relationship between humanity and technology. Here, wonder replaces solitude, and I feel myself participating in the unfolding story of human creativity.
